login.heroDesc: Transform your HR operations with modern technology and seamless user experience.
login.welcomeSubtitle: Sign in to access your HR portal
login.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

register.heroDesc: Get started with your company's HR portal. Access your profile, timekeeping, and more.
register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Enter your company email to get started
register.emailHint: Use the company email provided by HR
register.emailVerifyFailed: Failed to verify email. Please try again.
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
register.passwordTooWeak: Password is too weak. Add uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and special characters.
register.registerSuccess: Registration successful! Please login with your new password.

forgotPassword.heroDesc: Don't worry, it happens to the best of us. We'll help you get back into your account securely.
forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link
forgotPassword.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
forgotPassword.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
forgotPassword.networkError: Unable to connect to server. Please try again later.
forgotPassword.checkEmailDesc: If an account exists for {{email}}, you'll receive a password reset link shortly.
forgotPassword.linkExpiry: The link will expire in 30 minutes. Don't forget to check your spam folder.

resetPassword.heroDesc: Choose a strong password to keep your account secure. We'll guide you through the requirements.
resetPassword.invalidLinkDesc: This password reset link is invalid or missing a token. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below
resetPassword.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
resetPassword.passwordTooWeak: Password is too weak. Add uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and special characters.
resetPassword.resetSuccess: Password reset successful! Please login with your new password.
resetPassword.networkError: Unable to connect to server. Please try again later.
resetPassword.successDesc: Your password has been changed successfully. Redirecting to login...
